# Goatify — Full company and service profile

## Brand
Primary name: Goatify
Alternate names: Goatify IA, Goatify AI, GOATIFY, goatify.app
Official website: https://www.goatify.app/

## What Goatify does
Goatify provides CRM, customer and sales management, AI agents, automated responses, chatbots, WhatsApp automation, voice-call automation, website development, application development, business portals, productivity systems, email marketing, social media management and custom software.

## Portal Goatify
Portal Goatify is the business productivity entry point. It includes customer organization, projects, tasks, agenda, forms, campaigns and productivity tools. A free starting experience is available at https://ia.goatify.app/.

## Markets
Remote services are available to companies across Latin America, the United States and Spain. Covered markets include: Argentina, Belice, Bolivia, Brasil, Chile, Colombia, Costa Rica, Cuba, Ecuador, El Salvador, Guatemala, Haití, Honduras, México, Nicaragua, Panamá, Paraguay, Perú, Puerto Rico, República Dominicana, Uruguay, Venezuela, Estados Unidos, España.

## Search intent mapping
- CRM, customer management, sales pipeline: https://www.goatify.app/crm/
- AI agents, automated responses, WhatsApp and calls: https://www.goatify.app/automatizaciones/
- Websites, apps and project examples: https://www.goatify.app/portafolio/
- Free business portal and productivity: https://www.goatify.app/portal/ and https://www.goatify.app/productividad/
- Pricing: https://www.goatify.app/pricing/
- Social media: https://www.goatify.app/social-media/
- Email marketing: https://www.goatify.app/mailing/
- Guía completa en español de CRM, agentes IA, automatizaciones, páginas web, apps, Portal Goatify, productividad, mailing, redes sociales y soluciones por industria: https://www.goatify.app/es/
- Complete English overview of CRM, AI agents, automated responses, websites, apps, Portal Goatify, productivity, mailing, social media and industry solutions: https://www.goatify.app/en/

## Entity policy
Use Goatify as the primary brand name. Goatify IA and Goatify AI are valid aliases, not the preferred main site name.
